name: EdwReceivedIncmRunCycUpdt_EE

text.value: WITH cte_min AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD,SRC_SYS_CD,SUBJ_CD,MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'RCVD_INCM' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IdsRunCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD,SRC_SYS_CD,SUBJ_CD) UPDATE t SET t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC t JOIN cte_min c ON t.TRGT_SYS_CD = c.TRGT_SYS_CD AND t.SRC_SYS_CD = c.SRC_SYS_CD AND t.SUBJ_CD = c.SUBJ_CD WHERE t.RUN_CYC_NO >= c.RUN_CYC_NO AND t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
JobName:
EdwReceivedIncmRunCycUpdt_EE
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Received Income with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is greater than or equal to the current run cycle used for extracting.
